ingredients.item:
VEGETABLES
3 large yellow potatoes (500 g), peeled and cut into ¼-inch (6 mm) wedges
1 large yellow onion, cut into eighths
ingredients.original:
VEGETABLES
3 large yellow potatoes (500 g), peeled and cut into ¼-inch (6 mm) wedges
1 large yellow onion, cut into eighths

ingredients.item: 7 small carrots (2/3 pound, or 300 g), sliced in half lengthwise and cut into 2-inch-long (5 cm) pieces
ingredients.original: 7 small carrots (2/3 pound, or 300 g), sliced in half lengthwise and cut into 2-inch-long (5 cm) pieces

ingredients.item:
CHICKEN
10 large cloves garlic, crushed into a paste using a small food processor, a mortar and pestle, or a garlic press
¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil
ingredients.original:
CHICKEN
10 large cloves garlic, crushed into a paste using a small food processor, a mortar and pestle, or a garlic press
¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil

ingredients.item: 8 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs (22/3 pounds, or 1.2 kg), patted dry
ingredients.original: 8 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs (22/3 pounds, or 1.2 kg), patted dry

ingredients.item: 1 Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Line a large, rimmed sheet pan with parchment paper.
ingredients.original: 1 Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Line a large, rimmed sheet pan with parchment paper.

ingredients.item: 2 TO MAKE THE VEGETABLES: Add the potatoes, onion, and carrots to a large bowl. Season with the ½ teaspoon salt, drizzle with the 1 tablespoon oil, and mix all the ingredients together. Transfer to the prepared sheet pan and spread in a single layer.
ingredients.original: 2 TO MAKE THE VEGETABLES: Add the potatoes, onion, and carrots to a large bowl. Season with the ½ teaspoon salt, drizzle with the 1 tablespoon oil, and mix all the ingredients together. Transfer to the prepared sheet pan and spread in a single layer.

ingredients.item: 3 TO MAKE THE CHICKEN: In a small bowl, combine the garlic, ¼ cup (60 ml) oil, za’atar, 2 teaspoons salt, onion powder, pepper, honey, and vinegar and mix well.
ingredients.original: 3 TO MAKE THE CHICKEN: In a small bowl, combine the garlic, ¼ cup (60 ml) oil, za’atar, 2 teaspoons salt, onion powder, pepper, honey, and vinegar and mix well.

ingredients.item: 4 Place the chicken thighs on the sheet pan with the vegetables. Pour all the marinade over the chicken and work it into each piece, ensuring both the fronts and backs of the thighs are coated. Work a few tablespoons of the marinade into the vegetables as well.
ingredients.original: 4 Place the chicken thighs on the sheet pan with the vegetables. Pour all the marinade over the chicken and work it into each piece, ensuring both the fronts and backs of the thighs are coated. Work a few tablespoons of the marinade into the vegetables as well.

ingredients.item: 5 Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, until the thighs are golden brown and cooked through. (Check that the chicken is white on the inside and the juices run clear.)
ingredients.original: 5 Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, until the thighs are golden brown and cooked through. (Check that the chicken is white on the inside and the juices run clear.)

ingredients.item: 6 Spoon the vegetables onto a platter and top with the chicken. Serve with pita bread and slaw or salad.
ingredients.original: 6 Spoon the vegetables onto a platter and top with the chicken. Serve with pita bread and slaw or salad.
